title: Chapter 8
content:
Chapter 8: Burst

The sudden shift from Denzel’s gentle persuasion to firm order was instantaneous and subtle.

’Is that an...order? From Denzel? Since when? What has he turned into. All my years of knowing him he has never been this commanding, I shouldn’t be doing this but...but...I just can’t resist. From the moment he touched me, I just can’t control myself anymore, I’m just like a slut now’ Sophia thought

Sophia inhaled sharply, a flush of red rising from her neck up to her cheeks.

The order which wasdelivered with a notable calm, decisive tone, immediately took away whatever remaining reservations she had.

She didn’t even question it. Without another word, Sophia then slowly slid off the bed to the floor where Denzel was already standing on and she went onto her knees on the thick woven rug in front of Denzel’s bed.

’That’s it, get on your knees you filthy slut and suck my dick. You said I’ve grown balls right, now you are about to suck them and get your throat fucked by them’ Denzel lewd thoughts continued to roam

Denzel adjusted himself ever so slightly, spreading his legs out wide and planting his feet strong and firmly on the floor.

’Since she can’t help but me resist me, I should give her more orders to build that image of her not being able to defy me in my head and truly become her master. Now what will it be...yes...I’ve got it’

"Sophia...drag my pants down" this was the order that came to his head and he requested it from her, his voice still calm, almost polite, but carrying the unmistakable weight of a man giving an order that must be followed.

Sophia nodded her head,

’Nice...I like her reaction, she’s slowly but turning into mt slut already. Now I just need to mark her as mine’ Denzel thought with a cheeky smile drawing across his face

Sophia didn’t get to see the smile on his face because all of her attention was now focused entirely on the zipper tab of his night wear.

Her hands were slightly shaking as she slowly placed her hands on his trousers and traced the small outline of his cock with her fingers

Then she proceeded to unbuttoned the trousers and dragged the zipper down, the harsh sound of metal grating against metal echoing loudly in the sudden quiet of the room.

She peeled the lightly and restrictive trousers that was holding back his cock.

She pulled it slowly and down over his hips and thighs, and then stopping them around the level of his knees.

This revealed his dark gray cotton boxer briefs, which already has an outline shaped by the size and pressure of his cock erected.

Even contained by the fabric, the monumental bulge was undeniable, a thick, angry head straining against the cotton weave.

The sight of it actually made Sophia hesitate slightly.

’Even though I’ve never had sex I have seen a few cocks but this is unlike what I’ve seen before and I haven’t even pulled it out yet. Oh my....’ Sophia thought which surprise clearly showing in her face

Denzel definitely didn’t miss this chance to issue out another order. With his cheeky and pervy personality, would he?

’With that face I can tell she’s fascinated by my cock and probably never seen anything like that before. I won’t blame her because I was surprised too. It’s much bigger than it was in my previous body’ Denzel thought

’That aside, here goes...’ his thoughts continued

"Pull it out" he ordered voice still calm and dominating Sophia slightly trembled

She knelt down there on the hard floor, her hands resting on his knees not yet ready to pull put his monster cock, her eyes wide as she contemplated the sheer size of what she was looking at.

The immediate, intense hunger from the kiss seemed to have been replaced by a genuine, startled apprehension.

’Oh my... It’s really huge,’ her expression clearly screamed these exact words.

Denzel had already seen her slight hesitation and her wave of genuine surprise.

He knew a moment like this, if not addressed, could break the momentum and introduce real doubt. It was the perfect moment for a little tease, a little light mockery.

"Are you scared, Sophia?" Denzel asked, letting a mocking smirk curve his lips. His voice was laced with a soft, patronizing challenge.

Sophia’s surprise instantly melted into a defiant scowl. "Shut up! Denzel dummy, I’m not scared, just a little surprised," she lashed back, her voice tight with embarrassment and pique.

Sophia’s blush deepened even more, her eyes still fixed on the rigid length that was straining against his boxers.

Your...your...cock, it’s unlike anything I’ve seen before not from other men. It’s much more bigger than all of them to be honest" she finally admitted and let the words come out of her mouth, the quiet confession was as clear and notable sign that the tease he pulled earlier had worked.

She once looked like she was about to flee but now she wasn’t, rather she was acfepting the challenge presented to her

Denzel chuckled, in a low, satisfied sound.

"Then don’t be scared, it won’t be that bad." He assured her, injecting just enough sincerity to soothe the surprise while keeping the command sharp.

Sophia nodded slightly, still shy, and took in a deep breath.

She reached out and, with her hands surprisingly steady, she grabbed the hem of his boxer briefs.

She slowly eased them down, revealing the full, hard length of his cock. It sprung up ferociously towards her face like a sword waiting to strike her immediately after being pulled from it’s sheath.

She said it was big but now it was bigger than what she had even imagined, more like the boxer briefs was hiding it’s full length

It was thick, veiny, and stood proud, throbbing faintly with rich blood flow like it was on the verge of explosion.

The head was a deep maroon, glistening slightly, and the shaft was a potent mix of pink and brown skin. It truly was impressive, a full eight inches of length, with a girth that spoke of serious stretching potential.
